title: HU14 3HH, Melton Energy Tech Ltd: environmental permit issued - EPR/ZP3322SC/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Melton Energy Tech Ltd Installation name: Melton Waste Park Anaerobic Digestion Facility Permit number: EPR/ZP3322SC/A001  "
